package fixture

import "context"

type Simple struct{}

func (m Simple) Encode(l interface{}, ctx context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteByte(0)
		w.WriteInt(1)
		w.WriteAsciiString("hi")
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
